note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable step drives real code and passes (must name a test); pending = specified behavior whose implementation does not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior, INV-22). All scenarios will drive the real core/skillstore state machine + store-backed composer + trial engine with in-memory fakes; pgx implementations are integration-tested under compose.

scenarios.name: A version row is created only with a rationale and a valid predicate
Every status transition goes through Transition and lands in the ledger
A second production version structurally supersedes the first
A draft targeting a pinned skill is rejected
Composition from the store is a pure function of typed signals
A store failure composes the compiled registry in full and records the fallback
A pinned skill composes its compiled body even when a store row targets it
The composed skill list is recorded so the seed is reconstructable
The library read surface exposes versions with rationale and scores
An unauthenticated skill read is refused
A machine principal has no write route
An operator write without a rationale is refused
Arm assignment is deterministic, idempotent, and rejects malformed refs
The finalizer sweeps timeouts before finalizing
Graduation requires samples, lift, the Welch test, and a healthy safety dimension
A trial that cannot complete at the observed session rate is refused
A tripped breaker auto-retires the graduate and restores the prior production version
A generated draft carries its rationale and has no effect until admitted
A draft that regresses the regression set is not admitted to a trial
The sealed holdout is not read during admission
The creation cron generates for a regressed dimension, admits, and starts one trial
The creation cron refuses to start a trial that traffic cannot complete
The trial dashboard exposes arm health and assignment staleness
